title: Noloth
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Noloth''' was a [[H'kig]] [[L'at H'kig|L'at]] captive of the [[Yevetha]] from [[J't'p'tan]]. He, along with all the other Yevethan captives, escaped thanks to the help of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]] and the ''[[Star Morning]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
